headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “No more boring food"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Markets React To: We worship Thee.
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: He said no , succubus be gone ye!
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Opinion: A classic take on cats. (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
